title: Ender Skeleton
description: I have added a NEW type Skeleton to the end which acts like an enderman and skeleton combo
body:
I have added a New Skeleton Type which only spawns in the end and it is able to Teleport just like an enderman and it pretty much acts like a combo of both.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bqPHwvbC6t0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
